ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_genre" TEXT /* Genre(s) associated with the artist */,
  "artist_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "artist_social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "artist_awards" TEXT /* JSON object containing information about awards the artist has received */,
  "artist_active_years" TEXT /* Range of years the artist has been active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist(s) associated with the track */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_type" TEXT /* Type of playlist (e.g., user-created, curated by the service) */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist's cover image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was last updated */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Privacy status of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the playlist */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track is marked as a favorite in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country of residence */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional text review provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artisttracks" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the track (e.g., main artist, featured artist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "track_id")
)
